title: Pale Oak Leaves
description: Transforms oak leaves into a soft, pale white texture, perfect for creating serene and mystical landscapes
body:
**Pale Oak Leaves**


This texture transforms traditional oak leaves into a soft, pale white version, creating a serene and otherworldly feel. Ideal for adding a mystical touch to your builds, these leaves stand out beautifully against natural and vibrant settings alike.
***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
